design_philosophy: A premium, motion-heavy, editorial architecture website inspired by the Halston Webflow template and Apple Vision Pro's fluid scroll experiences. It emphasizes high-end aesthetics, calm neutral palettes, massive serif typography, generous negative space, and butter-smooth framer-motion scroll reveals and parallax effects.

spacing_and_layout.grid_system: Bento and asymmetrical grids. Use col-span-full to 8 for hero images, leaving negative space.
spacing_and_layout.alignment: Left-aligned dominant. Center alignment only for stats or isolated quotes.

motion_and_interactions.page_transitions: Fade and slight translateY on route changes.
motion_and_interactions.hero_reveal: Staggered letter reveal for headings (using Framer Motion). Image clip-path reveal from bottom to top.
motion_and_interactions.scroll_effects: Parallax effect on large images using useScroll and useTransform. Images move slightly slower than the scroll.
motion_and_interactions.marquee: Slow, smooth horizontal scrolling text for brand statements or service lists.
motion_and_interactions.hover_states: Images scale up slightly (1.05) inside an overflow-hidden container. Buttons invert colors.
motion_and_interactions.accordions: Services section should use custom plus-icon toggles or Shadcn Accordion heavily customized to look minimal with a 1px bottom border.

components.navigation: Fixed header with crystal glassmorphism (backdrop-blur-xl bg-[#F8F7F5]/70), 1px subtle bottom border. Include 'ArchtiX' wordmark.
components.buttons: Flat, rectangular, no rounded corners. Solid dark background (#111111) with white text, or transparent with 1px dark border.
components.cards: Cardless design. Use raw grid items with subtle borders or just negative space separation.
components.contact_form: Minimalist inputs. 1px bottom border only (no full box), floating labels or simple placeholder. Uses Shadcn Input/Textarea stripped of standard borders.

content_requirements.address: Varadai Complex, Vivekanand Nagar A1 Cross, Gokak - 591307

hero_image.description: Luxury modern architecture exterior with pool

founder_images.description: Ar. Akshay Varadai - Architect working on model

instructions_to_main_agent: Use react-router-dom for multi-page routing (Home, About, Services, Projects, Contact).
Install and use Framer Motion heavily for scroll-linked animations, letter staggers, and page transitions.
Install lucide-react for UI icons (plus, minus, arrow-right).
Install react-fast-marquee for the text marquee sections.
Add 'Cormorant Garamond' and 'Manrope' to your Tailwind font config and fetch them via Google Fonts in index.css.
Do not use Shadcn card components. Use raw flex/grid layouts with large padding and subtle or no borders.
Use standard Shadcn forms for the Contact page but override the inputs to have only a bottom border (border-b) instead of full rounding.
Apply `data-testid` to all interactive elements (links, buttons, form inputs).
Ensure the hero heading uses a staggered character or word animation using Framer Motion.
